basic_details.job_title: CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 6 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Warehousing Corporation (CWC), a Navratna Central Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution, has invited online applications for the engagement of 6 Young Professionals across four post codes. The recruitment is notified vide Advertisement No. CWC/I-Engagement/Young Professional/2026/01 dated 09.07.2026. The engagement is initially for a fixed period of two years, extendable by one year, up to a maximum of three years (2+1 years). Eligible candidates can apply online at www.cewacor.nic.in from 09.07.2026 (00:00 hrs) to 22.07.2026 (23:5

application_fee.details: Application fee details were not specified in the official notification shared for this article. Candidates should check the online application portal on www.cewacor.nic.in at the time of applying for any applicable fee.

age_limit.details: The reckoning date for calculation of both age and experience is the last date of application, i.e., 22.07.2026.

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: Full-time MBA/PGDM with specialization in Human Resources

Full-time B.Sc in Agriculture along with Entomology from a recognised University. Preference will be given to candidates with an MBA (Marketing) or relevant experience in the pest control/services sector.

Two-year full-time regular Post Graduate Diploma/Post Graduate Degree in General Management/Marketing/Logistics/Supply Chain Management/Sales & Marketing Management from a recognized University or Institution
Same as Post Code 03 (the official notification presents these two posts under a single merged qualification entry)

qualification.details: Key eligibility notes as per the notification: | Candidates must possess the required mark sheets/certificates confirming eligibility as on 22.07.2026 (the last date of application). Experience will be counted only in the fields specified for each post; no other experience will be considered. The experience certificate must clearly state the field of experience; only post-qualification experience is counted. For Post Code 02 (PCS Marketing), desirable skills include good communication and interpersonal skills, basic knowledge of pest control techniques and services, proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), analytical and reporting skills, and the ability to coordinate with multiple stakeholders.

vacancy_details.Place / Region of Work: Human Resources Division, Corporate Office, New Delhi & CWC Training Institute, IGMRI, Hapur

post_wise_breakdown.place_region_of_work: Human Resources Division, Corporate Office, New Delhi & CWC Training Institute, IGMRI, Hapur

salary_details.up to 3 years' experience: Equivalent to E-2 pay scale posts of the Corporation
salary_details.more than 3 years' experience: Equivalent to E-3 pay scale posts of the Corporation
salary_details.details: Post Code 01 (Learning & Development): ₹50,000/- consolidated per month for 0 to 3 years' experience, OR ₹60,000/- consolidated per month for more than 3 years' experience. Post Code 02 (PCS Marketing): ₹50,000/- consolidated per month for 0 to 3 years' experience, OR ₹60,000/- consolidated per month for more than 3 years' experience. Post Code 03 (Marketing & Business Development - Hyderabad): ₹50,000/- consolidated per month for 0 to 3 years' experience, OR ₹60,000/- consolidated per month for more than 3 years' experience. Post Code 04 (Marketing & Business Development - Jaipur): Same remuneration structure as Post Code 03, as per the merged entry in the official notification. | The consolidated remuneration is inclusive of all applicable taxes, and no other facility or allowance will be provided in addition to it. | Young Professionals may be required to undertake domestic tours subject to approval of the Controlling Authority, and will be entitled to TA/DA/Lodging charges as above.

selection_process: The notification states that CWC reserves the right to fix criteria for shortlisting candidates in order to restrict the number of candidates called for Personal Interaction
based on the number of positions advertised. No written examination or other selection stage is mentioned in the notification.
how_to_apply: Visit the official CWC website: www.cewacor.nic.in.
Locate the online application link for Advertisement No. CWC/I-Engagement/Young Professional/2026/01.
Fill in all required details in the online application form, including educational qualifications, experience details (where applicable), and upload photo and signature.
Upload the required mark sheets/certificates and experience certificates as applicable.

The notification cautions that incomplete applications — such as those with educational qualifications not filled, experience details not filled where required, or photo/signature not uploaded — will be outright rejected. Candidates should ensure no field is left blank.
important_instructions: The terms and conditions of engagement will be governed by CWC's extant guidelines. CWC reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process at any stage. Candidates may apply for more than one position if they meet the eligibility criteria for each. Candidates must possess mark sheets/certificates confirming eligibility as on 22.07.2026. If the final qualifying degree/provisional certificate has not yet been received, candidates should upload all mark sheets up to the final semester examination taken. Experience will be counted only in the specific field required for the post applied for, and must be clearly stated in the experience certificate. Salary/pay slips will not be accepted as proof of work experience. CWC reserves the right to fix criteria for shortlisting candidates for Personal Interaction. All further announcements and any corrigendum will be published only on www.cewacor.nic.in; candidates are advised to keep checking the website regularly. Communications will also be sent by email to the registered email ID.

content_sections.heading: CWC Young Professional 2026 Notification PDF and Official Website
content_sections.text: The official notification for CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026 is published on the CWC website. Candidates are advised to read the full notification before applying. Download CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Here Official Website: cwc.gov.in/ Note: A direct notification PDF download link was not provided in the source document shared for this article; candidates should check the "Careers" or "Recruitment" section of www.cewacor.nic.in for the official PDF and online application link.

content_sections.heading: CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026: Quick Overview

rows.event: Reckoning Date for Age and Eligibility

content_sections.heading: CWC Young Professional Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: CWC has notified 6 vacancies across four post codes. Candidates may apply for more than one position if eligible. The notification also states that the place/region of work assigned to a Young Professional may be changed or modified depending on the Corporation's requirements at project sites and regional offices across India.

rows.place_region_of_work: Human Resources Division, Corporate Office, New Delhi & CWC Training Institute, IGMRI, Hapur

content_sections.heading: CWC Young Professional Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Key eligibility notes as per the notification: Candidates must possess the required mark sheets/certificates confirming eligibility as on 22.07.2026 (the last date of application). Experience will be counted only in the fields specified for each post; no other experience will be considered. The experience certificate must clearly state the field of experience; only post-qualification experience is counted. For Post Code 02 (PCS Marketing), desirable skills include good communication and interpersonal skills, basic knowledge of pest control techniques and services, proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), analytical and reporting skills, and the ability to coordinate with multiple stakeholders.

rows.essential_educational_qualification: Full-time MBA /PGDM with specialization in Human Resources
rows.experience_required: 0 to 3 years, OR more than 3 years' experience in the field of Learning & Development/Training

rows.essential_educational_qualification: Full-time B.Sc in Agriculture along with Entomology from a recognised University. Preference will be given to candidates with an MBA (Marketing) or relevant experience in the pest control/services sector.
rows.experience_required: 0 to 3 years, OR more than 3 years' experience in the pest control/services sector

rows.essential_educational_qualification: Two-year full-time regular Post Graduate Diploma /Post Graduate Degree in General Management/Marketing/Logistics/Supply Chain Management/Sales & Marketing Management from a recognized University or Institution
rows.experience_required: 0 to 3 years, OR more than 3 years' experience in the Warehousing or Logistics sector in a Government Organization/Public Sector Undertaking/Commercial Organization/Private Organization

rows.essential_educational_qualification: Same as Post Code 03 (the official notification presents these two posts under a single merged qualification entry)

content_sections.heading: CWC Young Professional Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: The reckoning date for calculation of both age and experience is the last date of application, i.e., 22.07.2026 .

rows.upper_age_limit: 35 Years (shown as a merged entry with Post Code 03 in the official notification)

content_sections.heading: CWC Young Professional Roles and Responsibilities
content_sections.text: Supporting the formulation and execution of the Annual Training and Capacity Building Plan and conducting Training Needs Analysis (TNA). Assisting in designing functional, behavioral, and leadership development programs, and coordinating with external training institutes and consultants. Managing end-to-end training logistics, maintaining the Training Calendar, and preparing training reports and dashboards. Supporting implementation of Learning Management Systems/e-learning platforms, including the iGOT Karmayogi Portal. Analyzing training feedback and effectiveness, and preparing periodic reports on Learning & Development outcomes and ROI. Identifying new business opportunities and clients for pest control services, and supporting preparation of proposals, tenders, and quotations. Conducting market surveys and competitor analysis, and maintaining liaison with existing clients. Coordinating with Field units/Technical Teams to achieve marketing targets and revenue goals. Maintaining records of tenders participated in, awarded, and pending, and supporting timely billing and documentation. Supporting digital and offline marketing initiatives for PCS (Pest Control Services). Conducting market research to identify stakeholders, trends, and competitors relevant to CWC's warehousing and logistics services. Engaging with farmers, FPOs, FPCs, banks, and trading platforms for post-harvest warehousing, as well as bulk procurers, e-commerce operators, and 3PL/4PL/5PL operators. Engaging with EXIM and Private Container Train Operator (PCTO) stakeholders including shipping lines, freight forwarders, Customs, and Indian Railways. Developing and implementing strategies to promote CWC's business verticals and expand its customer base. Creating marketing materials and reaching stakeholders through door-to-door marketing, social media, WhatsApp, and cold calling. Organizing training sessions, workshops, and field visits at CWC warehouses to educate stakeholders about CWC's services. Collecting stakeholder feedback and communicating it to CWC management for continuous improvement. Identifying areas for market expansion and recommending business development strategies for new regions. Setting and tracking sales targets for the respective business vertical, and preparing regular activity reports. Working in coordination with the Regional Marketing Head and Regional Manager of the region, and staying updated on CWC/GoI policies and schemes relevant to e-commerce, logistics, and supply chain operations. As per the notification, this job description is indicative of the general nature of work and is not an exhaustive list; specific duties may vary based on the Corporation's requirements.

content_sections.heading: CWC Young Professional Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: Application fee details were not specified in the official notification shared for this article. Candidates should check the online application portal on www.cewacor.nic.in at the time of applying for any applicable fee.

content_sections.heading: CWC Young Professional Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: The notification states that CWC reserves the right to fix criteria for shortlisting candidates in order to restrict the number of candidates called for Personal Interaction , based on the number of positions advertised. No written examination or other selection stage is mentioned in the notification.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Mark sheets and certificates confirming educational eligibility (up to the final semester, if the final degree/provisional certificate has not yet been received). A certificate confirming the qualifying degree/diploma is a regular course, if this is not clearly mentioned on the degree/diploma certificate itself. Post-qualification work experience certificates from past/present employers, clearly stating pay details and duration, wherever experience is claimed. Salary/pay slips will not be accepted as proof of work experience. Photograph and signature, as required in the online application form.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The notification cautions that incomplete applications — such as those with educational qualifications not filled, experience details not filled where required, or photo/signature not uploaded — will be outright rejected. Candidates should ensure no field is left blank.

content_sections.heading: CWC Young Professional Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Post Code 01 (Learning & Development): ₹50,000/- consolidated per month for 0 to 3 years' experience, OR ₹60,000/- consolidated per month for more than 3 years' experience. Post Code 02 (PCS Marketing): ₹50,000/- consolidated per month for 0 to 3 years' experience, OR ₹60,000/- consolidated per month for more than 3 years' experience. Post Code 03 (Marketing & Business Development - Hyderabad): ₹50,000/- consolidated per month for 0 to 3 years' experience, OR ₹60,000/- consolidated per month for more than 3 years' experience. Post Code 04 (Marketing & Business Development - Jaipur): Same remuneration structure as Post Code 03, as per the merged entry in the official notification. The consolidated remuneration is inclusive of all applicable taxes, and no other facility or allowance will be provided in addition to it. Young Professionals may be required to undertake domestic tours subject to approval of the Controlling Authority, and will be entitled to TA/DA/Lodging charges as above.

rows.ta_da_lodging_entitlement: Equivalent to E-2 pay scale posts of the Corporation
Equivalent to E-3 pay scale posts of the Corporation

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The terms and conditions of engagement will be governed by CWC's extant guidelines. CWC reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process at any stage. Candidates may apply for more than one position if they meet the eligibility criteria for each. Candidates must possess mark sheets/certificates confirming eligibility as on 22.07.2026. If the final qualifying degree/provisional certificate has not yet been received, candidates should upload all mark sheets up to the final semester examination taken. Experience will be counted only in the specific field required for the post applied for, and must be clearly stated in the experience certificate. Salary/pay slips will not be accepted as proof of work experience. CWC reserves the right to fix criteria for shortlisting candidates for Personal Interaction. All further announcements and any corrigendum will be published only on www.cewacor.nic.in; candidates are advised to keep checking the website regularly. Communications will also be sent by email to the registered email ID.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies across 4 post codes: Learning & Development (1), PCS Marketing (1), Marketing & Business Development - Hyderabad (2), and Marketing & Business Development - Jaipur (2).

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 22.07.2026 at 23:59 Hrs. Applications opened on 09.07.2026 at 00:00 Hrs.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary of a CWC Young Professional?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly remuneration is ₹50,000/- for candidates with 0 to 3 years' experience, and ₹60,000/- for candidates with more than 3 years' experience, inclusive of all applicable taxes.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 35 years for all four post codes, reckoned as on the last date of application, 22.07.2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an application fee. Candidates should check the online application portal at the time of applying.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for CWC Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: Selection is based on Personal Interaction. CWC reserves the right to fix shortlisting criteria to restrict the number of candidates called, depending on the number of positions advertised.

faq.question: Q7. Can I apply for more than one CWC Young Professional post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates may apply for more than one position, provided they meet the eligibility criteria for each post applied for.

faq.question: Q8. What is the tenure of engagement for CWC Young Professionals?
faq.answer: The engagement is initially for a fixed period of two years, which may be extended by one year, up to a maximum of three years (2+1 years).

faq.question: Q9. Where can I apply for CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official CWC website, www.cewacor.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for CWC Young Professional Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need mark sheets/certificates confirming eligibility, a regular-course certificate (if not clearly stated on the degree), and post-qualification experience certificates with pay details and duration. Salary slips are not accepted as proof of experience.
